title: Task Complete
description: Payload an agent sends when it finishes a task

taskId.description: Unique identifier of the completed task

agentName.description: Name of the agent that completed the task

filesChanged.description: Relative paths of every file created or modified

testsPassed.description: Number of test assertions / cases that passed

testsFailed.description: Number of test assertions / cases that failed

commitHash.description: Full or short SHA of the commit produced by this task

learnings.description: Key takeaways the agent wants to persist to long-term memory

completedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the task was completed (optional, defaults to now)
